title: Crusty Savory Comte Cheese Wraps
description: Malty and juicy savoury wraps featuring low-carb-friendly Comte cheese glaze for a delicious brunch-mood Slovakian dish.
instructions: Slice Comte cheese and place it in the bread wraps. Press slightly into each wrap.
Mix glaze ingredients and brush onto wraps evenly, focusing on top layers of cheese where they will be exposed after cooking.
Place wrapped slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or lightly greased.
Bake for 15 minutes at 375°F. Check periodically to prevent burning; remove when golden brown but still soft inside (around 20-25 minutes total).
Let cool for a minute before serving, garnished with fresh vegetables if desired.
